title: 10 Signs Your Phone Has Become Your God
caption:
You'd never build an altar in your living room. You already carry one in your pocket.

It's the first thing you touch and the last thing you check. You know your screen time to the minute and couldn't guess your prayer time. Silence sends you to it before it sends you to Him.

It's where you go to feel better, not to confess. It decides your mood before anything else gets a vote. And you trust its opinion of you more than His.

"You shall have no other gods before me." — Exodus 20:3

If you can't put it down for a full day on purpose, something's sitting on the throne that shouldn't be there.

Save this and try the day without it.

#faith #christianmen #phoneaddiction #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #exodus #scripture #christianity
